title: Steve Duffy
compiled_truth: Steve Duffy is an Enron employee at [Enron](companies/enron). Over the corpus period (1999-07-12 to 2000-09-29), Steve Duffy sent 30 and received 36 emails, totalling 66 interactions. Top correspondents: [Stanley Horton](people/stanley-horton) (29), [Dana Gibbs](people/dana-gibbs) (15), [Susan Ralph](people/susan-ralph) (12), [Lori Maddox](people/lori-maddox) (11), [Michael Burke](people/michael-burke) (10).
